error_signature: The selected tools are not supported by 'Conversational Agent'
title: Unsupported tools for Conversational Agent
symptom: When executing a workflow with the AI Agent node, an error indicates that the selected tools are not supported by the 'Conversational Agent'.
not_this_if: No tools selected in the node
root_cause: The error occurs because the version of the AI Agent node being used is outdated and does not support the tools selected for the Conversational Agent. This can happen if the node has not been updated to the latest version that includes support for the required tools.
fix_steps: Update the AI Agent node to the latest version
Reconfigure the tools in the node if necessary
Save the workflow and try executing it again
agent_instruction: Update the AI Agent node to the latest version and reconfigure the tools.
